title: Pick WebSocket vs SSE vs long-polling
meta_description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with 2026 latency benchmarks and AWS cost sheets—choose the right real-time protocol for your stack
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets because it sounds modern, then waste $1,800 on extra load balancers.

SSE gives 12 ms latency for $2.30 per million requests.

https://kubaik.github.io/pick-websocket-vs-sse-vs-long-polling

#Crypto #WebDev #WebSockets #RealTime

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
